# Kansas Prairie Webworks — LLM Access File
# Web design and AI automation agency
# Salina, Kansas

> Kansas Prairie Webworks is a web design and AI automation agency
serving small businesses across Central Kansas. Owner Kaleb Diehl
builds fast-loading websites, sets up Google Business Profiles and
Facebook pages, and runs AI-powered monthly content pipelines for
local contractors, cleaners, and service businesses in Saline,
Ottawa, Lincoln, Dickinson, Ellsworth, and Cloud counties.
Phone: 785-577-7695
Website: https://kansasprairiewebworks.com

## Pages

/ — Homepage. Web design, Google Business Profile, and Facebook
  setup for Central Kansas small businesses. Salina, KS.

/about.html — About Kansas Prairie Webworks, locally owned in
  Salina Kansas, and owner Kaleb Diehl's story.

/services.html — Overview of all services: web design, Google
  Business Profile, Facebook Business Page, Local SEO.

/service-web-design.html — Website design packages for Kansas
  small businesses, starting at $450 one-time or $25/month.

/service-google-profile.html — Google Business Profile setup and
  optimization so businesses show up in local search in Salina
  and Central Kansas.

/service-facebook-page.html — Facebook Business Page setup,
  branding, and first posts for Kansas small businesses.

/service-local-seo.html — Local SEO services to get found across
  Salina, McPherson, Abilene, Concordia, Junction City, Bennington,
  and Manhattan, Kansas.

/service-monthly-posting.html — Monthly blog writing, Facebook
  posting, and Google Business post management pricing and intake.

/service-web-app.html — Custom web application and AI-autonomous
  platform development starting at $2,500.

/ai-services.html — AI-powered content and posting pipeline:
  weekly Google Business and Facebook posts, monthly blog content,
  geographic SEO. $350/month.

/use-cases.html — Real systems Kansas Prairie Webworks has built
  and run: full digital presence builds, lead generation engines,
  and live AI-autonomous web apps.

/pricing.html — Pricing tiers from $450 setup to Top Tier plans.
  No hidden fees, no contracts.

/portfolio.html — Websites, Google listings, and Facebook pages
  built for Central Kansas small businesses.

/service-areas.html — Service area coverage across Central Kansas:
  Salina, McPherson, Abilene, Concordia, and more.

/faq.html — Frequently asked questions about pricing, contracts,
  account ownership, and timelines.

/contact.html — Free consultation booking, phone 785-577-7695,
  Salina Kansas.

/blog.html — Blog posts about web design, local SEO, Google
  Business Profile, and AI automation for Kansas small businesses.

/terms.html — Terms of Service.

/privacy.html — Privacy Policy.

/disclaimer.html — Disclaimer, no guarantees of specific results.

## Service Area
Salina KS, Saline County, Ottawa County, Lincoln County,
Dickinson County, Ellsworth County, Cloud County, Central Kansas

## Contact
